# Function: sqlite()

```ts
function sqlite(options?): SqliteHandle;
```

Defined in: [integrations/sqlite/sqlite.ts:200](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/integrations/sqlite/sqlite.ts#L200)

Create a SQLite service handle. Uses file-copy isolation for parallel tests.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `options` | [`SqliteOptions`](../interfaces/SqliteOptions.md) |

## Returns

`SqliteHandle`

## Example

```ts
// With Prisma schema
  const db = sqlite({ prismaSchema: './prisma/schema' });

  // With raw SQL init
  const db = sqlite({ init: './schema.sql' });

  // Empty database
  const db = sqlite();
```
